# Monitor Physical Dimensions

Three-monitor setup: AOC (DP-1) · ASUS (DP-2) · AOC (DP-3)

| Dimension               | AOC Q27G2SG4B+ `DP-1` / `DP-3` | ASUS XG27AQWMG `DP-2` |
|-------------------------|--------------------------------:|----------------------:|
| Total Width             | 611.8 mm                        | 605.0 mm              |
| Total Height            | 365.8 mm                        | 368.0 mm              |
| Screen Width (active)   | 596.7 mm                        | 590.4 mm              |
| Screen Height (active)  | 335.7 mm                        | 331.9 mm              |
| Top bezel               | ≈ 7.5 mm                        | 8.0 mm                |
| Side bezels (each)      | ≈ 7.5 mm                        | 9.0 mm                |
| Bottom bezel (chin)     | ≈ 22.6 mm                       | 13.0 mm               |

## Bezel gaps (adjacent screen edges)

Single row, so only horizontal gaps matter.

| Gap              | Left monitor right bezel | Right monitor left bezel | Total  |
|------------------|-------------------------:|-------------------------:|-------:|
| DP-1 → DP-2      | 7.5 mm (AOC)             | 9.0 mm (ASUS)            | **16.5 mm** |
| DP-2 → DP-3      | 9.0 mm (ASUS)            | 7.5 mm (AOC)             | **16.5 mm** |
